title: EveryLinguaAI — Multilingual Voice Assistant
summary: Engineered a modular, real-time multilingual voice assistant with wake-word activation, dynamic language switching, and GPT-powered conversational intelligence.
intro: Designed and developed a production-style AI voice assistant system capable of real-time multilingual interaction, combining speech recognition, language translation, and conversational AI into a cohesive, extensible architecture.
quote: Built a modular, real-time AI voice assistant capable of understanding and responding across 50+ languages with natural conversational flow.
problem: Most voice assistants are limited in multilingual support and struggle to provide seamless, context-aware interactions across diverse languages. Additionally, many lack flexibility in configuration, making them difficult to adapt to real-world environments and different hardware setups.

media.alt: Multilingual AI voice assistant processing speech input and generating spoken responses with real-time interaction

architecture.description: Built as a modular, event-driven voice system with dedicated components for wake-word detection, speech processing, AI interaction, and audio output, enabling scalability and maintainability.

implementation.title: Wake Word Detection & Voice Activation
implementation.body: Implemented a wake-word system with fuzzy matching to reliably activate the assistant in real-world conditions. Designed configurable thresholds and timeout handling to balance responsiveness and false positives.

media.alt: Wake word detection and activation flow

implementation.title: Modular Audio & Speech Processing System
implementation.body: Developed a structured audio pipeline handling microphone selection, calibration, and speech-to-text conversion. Built reusable modules for capturing, processing, and normalizing audio input across multiple environments.

media.alt: Audio capture and speech processing modules

implementation.title: Multilingual AI Conversation Engine
implementation.body: Integrated OpenAI GPT models with dynamic language detection and translation, enabling context-aware conversations across 50+ languages. Designed flexible prompts and token controls to balance response quality and cost efficiency.

implementation.title: System Orchestration & Configuration Layer
implementation.body: Architected a clean separation of concerns with modules for orchestration, configuration, logging, and conversation flow. Enabled environment-based configuration for microphone tuning, latency control, and debugging.

implementation.title: Real-Time Interaction Loop & Reliability
implementation.body: Built a continuous interaction loop supporting wake, listen, respond, and reset cycles. Implemented error handling, fallback logic, and microphone auto-switching to ensure stability in real-world usage.

reflection: This project significantly advanced my ability to design modular, real-time systems that integrate AI with low-level input/output processing. It reinforced principles of separation of concerns, reliability, and performance optimization in interactive applications.

title: GoodMil Construction & Real Estate Website
summary: Designed and developed a full-featured Django website for a leading Nepali construction company, featuring a dynamic CMS, advanced property search, and engaging animations.
intro: Built a modern, high-performance digital platform for GoodMil Amrit Nirman Sewa — a prominent construction, architecture, interior design, and real estate firm in Nepal. The website significantly enhanced their online presence and client engagement.
quote: Successfully delivered a professional digital platform that showcases 50+ construction projects and streamlines client engagement.
problem: GoodMil Amrit Nirman Sewa needed a strong digital presence to showcase their expertise in architecture, interior design, construction, and real estate. Their previous online presence was minimal and not reflective of their capabilities in Nepal’s competitive construction industry.

media.alt: GoodMil Amrit Nirman Sewa official website showcasing construction projects and real estate listings

architecture.description: The platform follows a classic Django MVT architecture with a robust admin panel and well-organized media handling.

implementation.title: Django Backend & CMS
implementation.body: Architected a comprehensive Django application with 12+ models to manage projects, real estate listings, blog content, and client inquiries. Built a powerful admin dashboard for seamless content management.

implementation.title: Advanced Frontend & Animations
implementation.body: Created a responsive, visually rich frontend using modern HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery. Integrated GSAP and AOS for smooth scroll animations and interactive elements that enhance storytelling.

implementation.title: Property Search & Real Estate Features
implementation.body: Implemented a robust property search system with multiple filters, dynamic listings, and an efficient backend query structure to help potential clients discover properties easily.

media.code: def property_search(request):\n    queryset = Property.objects.all()\n    # Advanced filtering logic...

reflection: This project strengthened my expertise in building complete full-stack solutions for real-world businesses, especially in balancing beautiful design with robust backend architecture and performance optimization.

title: Sara Global Store E-Commerce Suite
summary: Built a full-featured Django e-commerce platform for cosmetics and beauty products with advanced cart, order tracking, reviews, and promotional systems.
intro: Developed and deployed a complete, production-ready e-commerce website for Sara Global Store, specializing in cosmetics and beauty products in Nepal. The platform handles real customer transactions, inventory management, and order fulfillment with a focus on scalability and excellent user experience.
quote: Delivered a secure, scalable, and user-friendly e-commerce solution that successfully processes real customer orders in the competitive beauty market.
problem: Sara Global Store needed a modern, reliable, and scalable online platform to sell cosmetics and beauty products in Nepal. They required a solution that could handle real customer transactions, manage inventory effectively, and provide an excellent shopping experience while being easy to maintain and update.

media.alt: Sara Global Store e-commerce website showcasing cosmetics and beauty products

architecture.description: The platform uses a modular Django multi-app architecture with separate apps for products, cart, orders, users, and reviews for better maintainability and scalability.

implementation.title: Django E-Commerce Core
implementation.body: Architected a full-stack Django application with a multi-app structure covering product catalog, authentication, shopping cart, order management, and customer reviews. Implemented a complete 5-stage order workflow with real-time tracking.

implementation.title: Frontend & Shopping Experience
implementation.body: Built a responsive, mobile-first interface with smooth AJAX-powered cart, wishlist, advanced search with filters, and an intuitive checkout process. Added engaging features like exit-intent popups to improve conversion.

implementation.title: Admin Dashboard & Promotions
implementation.body: Developed a comprehensive admin panel for managing products, inventory, orders, and promotional campaigns. Built a custom discount and promo code engine with automated email notifications.

media.code:
class Order(models.Model):
    status = models.CharField(choices=ORDER_STATUS)
    tracking_id = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    # 5-stage workflow logic...

reflection: This project deepened my expertise in building production-grade e-commerce solutions, particularly in handling complex business logic, order workflows, and delivering delightful shopping experiences using Django.

title: Enterprise Subscription Management & Reminder System
summary: Architected a production-grade subscription management platform with serverless automation, multi-tenant support, and enterprise-level security for SaaS lifecycle management.
intro: Designed and built a scalable subscription management system tailored for enterprise SaaS platforms — combining intelligent automation, secure multi-tenant architecture, and real-time lifecycle tracking to streamline subscription operations.
quote: Engineered a scalable, automation-driven subscription system capable of handling complex enterprise workflows with high reliability and security.
problem: Modern SaaS businesses require reliable systems to manage subscription lifecycles, automate reminders, and ensure secure multi-tenant operations. Many existing solutions lack flexibility, scalability, or the ability to handle complex workflows with enterprise-grade reliability.

media.alt: Enterprise subscription management dashboard showing lifecycle tracking, analytics, and automation workflows

architecture.description: Built on a modular Node.js/Express architecture with MongoDB, leveraging serverless workflows for asynchronous task execution and a secure multi-tenant RBAC system.

implementation.title: Scalable API & Multi-Tenant Architecture
implementation.body: Developed a robust RESTful API using Node.js and Express with MongoDB and Mongoose for schema management. Designed the system to support multi-tenant environments with isolated data handling and scalable query performance.

implementation.title: Serverless Automation & Workflow Orchestration
implementation.body: Integrated Upstash QStash to orchestrate automated reminder workflows with durable execution. Implemented multi-stage notification sequences (7, 5, 2, 1 days) with retry logic and failure handling for reliability.

implementation.title: Subscription Lifecycle Engine & State Management
implementation.body: Engineered a robust state machine to manage subscription lifecycle transitions across key states including trial, active, paused, canceled, and expired. Designed deterministic transition rules to ensure only valid state changes occur, preventing inconsistent or invalid subscription behavior. Automated lifecycle events such as trial-to-active conversion, renewal handling, expiration checks, and pause/resume flows to reduce manual intervention. Integrated the state engine with background workflows and reminder systems to keep subscription status synchronized across asynchronous processes. Ensured data consistency and reliability across all user interactions, API operations, and scheduled jobs by centralizing state logic and maintaining a single source of truth for subscription status.

implementation.title: Security, Performance & Admin Systems
implementation.body: Implemented JWT authentication with RBAC roles (admin, manager, support, user) alongside Arcjet rate limiting and email verification. Optimized performance using pagination, field selection, and efficient queries. Built admin dashboards for monitoring subscriptions, workflows, and analytics.

reflection: This project significantly deepened my understanding of enterprise system design, particularly in building scalable APIs, orchestrating serverless workflows, and managing complex business logic with strong security and performance considerations.

title: Uncharted Pages Bookstore Platform
summary: Developed a visually immersive Django-powered publishing platform featuring 3D animations, e-commerce functionality, and a dynamic content system for short story collections.
intro: Built a visually rich digital publishing platform for Uncharted Pages — combining storytelling, immersive animations, and e-commerce to create a unique literary experience that engages readers and drives book sales.
quote: Successfully launched a production-ready publishing platform combining immersive storytelling with real-world e-commerce functionality.
problem: Uncharted Pages required a digital platform that could not only showcase short story collections but also provide an immersive reading experience while enabling direct book sales. Traditional publishing sites lacked the visual engagement needed to captivate modern audiences.

media.alt: Uncharted Pages platform showcasing immersive storytelling interface with animations and book purchasing features

architecture.description: Built using Django’s MVT architecture with integrated e-commerce logic, content management system, and interactive frontend layers powered by JavaScript and particle effects.

implementation.title: Django Backend & Publishing CMS
implementation.body: Developed a robust Django application to manage blog posts, book listings, customer orders, and inquiries. Built an intuitive admin interface allowing seamless content publishing and order management.

implementation.title: Immersive Frontend & 3D Experience
implementation.body: Engineered visually engaging UI using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Integrated Particles.js and custom animations to create a dynamic storytelling experience with smooth transitions and interactive visual effects.

implementation.title: E-commerce & Order Management System
implementation.body: Implemented a full-featured book ordering workflow including payment proof uploads, order tracking, and backend validation. Designed systems for managing customers, purchases, and communication efficiently.

media.code:
def create_order(request):
    # Handle book order creation

reflection: This project strengthened my ability to merge creative frontend development with practical backend systems, particularly in building production-ready e-commerce solutions with engaging user experiences.
